---
title: "test_rpc_phase_89.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_rpc_phase_89.py"
loc: 48
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.20
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.49
---

## Intent
The `test_rpc_phase_89.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestRPCPhase89, setUp, test_get_recent_traces_empty, test_get_architectural_suggestions_parsing, test_get_dashboard_state_structure. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestRPCPhase89, setUp, test_get_recent_traces_empty, test_get_architectural_suggestions_parsing, test_get_dashboard_state_structure. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.rpc](file://src.cstar.core.rpc)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
- `TestRPCPhase89`
- `setUp`
- `test_get_recent_traces_empty`
- `test_get_architectural_suggestions_parsing`
- `test_get_dashboard_state_structure`
